title: GET /books with author filter implemented
evidence: app.py:130-140 list_books() with optional author parameter

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: app.py:152-176 update_book() with validation and partial updates

title: SQLite database integration
evidence: app.py:7 imports sqlite3, app.py:14-37 get_db() and init_db() functions

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: app.py uses jsonify() for all responses with correct status codes (200, 201, 204, 400, 404)

title: Input validation for title and author
evidence: app.py:50-86 validate_payload() enforces title and author as required non-empty strings

title: Health check endpoint GET /health
evidence: app.py:103-105 health() endpoint returns status ok with 200

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md contains setup, running, testing, and API documentation

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: test_app.py contains 7 passing tests (test_health, test_create_and_get_book, test_create_requires_title_and_author, test_list_and_author_filter, test_update_book, test_delete_book, test_get_missing_book_returns_404)
